meta.title: Deploying with GitHub Actions
meta.intro: Learn how to deploy your projects with GitHub Actions.

body:
# Deploying with GitHub Actions

Learn how to deploy your projects with GitHub Actions.

## Links

* [Configuring and managing deployments](/en/actions/how-tos/deploy/configure-and-manage-deployments)

  View your deployment history and configure rules to protect your deployments.

* [Deploying to third-party platforms](/en/actions/how-tos/deploy/deploy-to-third-party-platforms)

  Learn how to deploy to third-party platforms as part of your continuous deployment and continuous integration workflows.
